dependencyDashboardHeader:
## How to use this dashboard Full playbook: [RENOVATE_STRATEGY.md](../blob/main/.github/RENOVATE_STRATEGY.md) **Quick section reference** - **Pending Approval**: should stay empty — we no longer gate any update behind dashboard approval. - **Awaiting Schedule** / **Rate-Limited**: automatic, no action needed. - **Pending Status Checks**: should stay empty. Renovate PRs open immediately so CI runs on the PR itself. - **PR Closed (Blocked)**: previously closed. Only tick to retry. - **Detected Dependencies**: reference only.
Automerge policy | Dependency type | Auto/Manual | Release age | Commit type | Triggers release? | | --- | --- | --- | --- | --- | | `@sanity/*` and other production `dependencies` | Auto | 3 days | `fix(deps)` | **Yes, patch** | | Catalog non-`@sanity` deps (rxjs, groq-js, react-compiler-runtime, react-error-boundary) | Auto | 3 days | `chore` | No — catalog hides depType, see RENOVATE_STRATEGY.md | | eslint / vitest / commitlint / react groups, app deps, devDependencies | Auto | 3 days | `chore(*)` | No | | High-severity security | Manual | 0 days | varies | varies | | Trusted upstream (Sanity-maintained, React, Next, `@types/*`, etc.; full list in [preset](https://github.com/sanity-io/renovate-config/blob/main/min-age-3days.json)) | inherits | **0 days** | inherits | inherits |
Common actions **Retry a closed PR**: find it under "PR Closed (Blocked)" and tick the box. **A breaking major landed**: majors automerge after CI + release age like everything else. If a major is a breaking change for our consumers, change its commit type from `fix(deps)` to `feat(deps)!` (or add a `BREAKING CHANGE:` footer) when squashing so release-please produces a major/minor bump. **A PR won't automerge**: check CI status and that the PR is approved (the auto-approve workflow approves once checks pass). **A lockfile looks broken**: run `pnpm install` locally, commit, and push to the Renovate branch. Renovate won't overwrite manual commits. **Rate-limited queue is huge**: drain it by merging open Renovate PRs. The throttles are `prHourlyLimit` (currently 5, the creation rate) and `prConcurrentLimit` (currently 20, the open-PR ceiling) in `.github/renovate.json`; raise either temporarily if needed. **The pnpm version** comes from the root `package.json` `packageManager` field — Renovate reads it automatically (no `constraints` override).
Weekly checklist - Skim the dashboard for anything stuck (errored, or repeatedly failing automerge). - Merge the release-please PR if ready. - Note any major updates that need planning.

packageRules.description: Group @sanity/* deps; production, triggers a patch release
All other production deps; triggers a patch release
Pin groq and @sanity/codegen to the typegen-experimental prerelease; don't bump to stable
